en: Hello friends, you must have heard the name Paragon.
But do you know what is the meaning of the word Paragon?
Paragon means a model of excellence or perfection of a kind.
ko: Paragon은 어떤 종류의 탁월함이나 완벽함의 모범을 뜻합니다.

en: Something which is very perfect, very excellent is called Paragon in English.
ko: 매우 완벽하고 매우 뛰어난 것을 영어로 Paragon이라고 합니다.

en: Like this sentence, Gandhiji was a Paragon of Virtue.
For more such interesting videos, subscribe to our channel.
ko: 더 재미있는 영상을 보려면 저희 채널을 구독해주세요.
